case_title: CARLOS M. SERRANO VS. OSWALD I. MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY SERRANO, CARLOS M. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, OSWALD I. DBA KEVIN'S AUTO MECHANICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERRANO, CARLOS M. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-26-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFNEDANT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ELLEN ROSENTHAL PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT'S SON, KEVIN MARTINEZ IS SWORN AND ACTS AS DEFENDANT'S SPANISH INTERPRETER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY MARTINEZ, OSWALD I. DBA KEVIN'S AUTO MECHANICS SERRANO, CARLOS M.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT MARTINEZ, OSWALD I. DBA KEVIN'S AUTO MECHANICS TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT SERRANO, CARLOS M. JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APPELLANT OSWALD I. MARTINEZ AND AGAINST RESPONDENT CARLOS M. SERRANO IN THE AMOUNT OF ZERO. EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERRANO, CARLOS M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, OSWALD I. DBA KEVIN'S AUTO MECHANICS $3,375.93 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,405.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR FEB-28-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2013 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED NOV-15-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, OSWALD I. DBA KEVIN'S AUTO MECHANICS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY SERRANO, CARLOS M. MARTINEZ, OSWALD I. DBA KEVIN'S AUTO MECHANICS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT MARTINEZ, OSWALD I. DBA KEVIN'S AUTO MECHANICS MAILED TO RESPONDENT SERRANO, CARLOS M.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2013 BY CHARLENE P. ROSACK. PLAINTIFF APPEARS WITH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ. DEFENDANT APPEARS WITH OSWALDO MARTINEZ JR. (SON) AND HUGO MARTINEZ (BROTHER). EXHIBITS INTRODUCED BY PLAINTIFF AND RETURNED. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. DEPT 525.
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
